scores.correctness_notes: All three sections (services, checks, log-targets) are correctly structured with required fields. on-check-failure correctly links check to action. Log target uses correct Loki push URL format.
scores.hallucination_notes: backoff-delay, backoff-factor, backoff-limit are included — these are valid Pebble service fields so not hallucinated. The response is accurate overall. Minor: gold standard notes that startup defaults to disabled but that's just a default, not an error to set it explicitly.
